title: Docs to MS WORD format
excerpt:
Hi, 
Is there a way to export a Monday Doc I created to MS WORD format? 
Thanks, 
Yaniv

posts.author: YanivG (Yaniv Goldberger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there a way to export a Monday Doc I created to MS WORD format?

Thanks,
Yaniv

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @YanivG

This is actually something our team is actively working on adding support for! While it’s not available quite yet, keep a look out for future releases

We’re also looking at being able to download them as PDFs, so stay tuned!

You can keep up to date with all of our new features by clicking on either of the Present Icons:

image1094×1178 125 KB

I hope this helps!

Cheers,
Jenna
